name: FOIA Request Processing
soc_title: Lawyers (proxy for FOIA officers and government information specialists)

substitution_rate.source: FPDS procurement signal (contractor spend decline + AI procurement growth)
substitution_rate.ai_growth_source: global AI procurement growth (no workload-specific keyword match)

absorption.reasoning: FOIA officer headcount roughly flat while request volume grows 5-7%/yr. AI-assisted redaction (DoD's RELYANT, State Department's FOIA Online) redirects officers from mechanical redaction to exemption-decision work.
absorption.fte_source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

volume.source: DOJ OIP FOIA Annual Report FY2023: ~1.5M federal FOIA requests received government-wide
